views.name: Active Staff
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_active" operator="eq" value="1" /></filter>

views.name: Staff Missing Email
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_primaryemail" operator="null" /></filter>

views.name: Staff Missing Dataverse User
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_systemuser" operator="null" /></filter>

views.name: Active Branch Memberships
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_active" operator="eq" value="1" /></filter>

views.name: Memberships by Branch
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>

views.name: Memberships by Role
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>

views.name: Active Aliases
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_active" operator="eq" value="1" /></filter>

views.name: Unverified Aliases
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_verifiedon" operator="null" /></filter>

views.name: Aliases by Source System
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>

views.name: Potential Duplicate Aliases
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_normalizedalias" operator="not-null" /></filter>

views.name: Active Policies
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_active" operator="eq" value="1" /></filter>

views.name: Draft/Inactive Policies
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_active" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>

views.name: Policies by Branch
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>

views.name: Quote Policies
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_worktype" operator="eq" value="985010000" /></filter>

views.name: Open Assignment Exceptions
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010000" /></filter>

views.name: Missing TSR Alias
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_exceptiontype" operator="eq" value="985010000" /><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010000" /></filter>

views.name: Missing CSSR Alias
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_exceptiontype" operator="eq" value="985010001" /><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010000" /></filter>

views.name: Blank/Zero Alias Exceptions
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><filter type="or"><condition attribute="qfu_exceptiontype" operator="eq" value="985010002" /><condition attribute="qfu_exceptiontype" operator="eq" value="985010003" /></filter><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010000" /></filter>

views.name: Resolved Exceptions
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010002" /></filter>

views.name: Open Work Items
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010000" /></filter>

views.name: Needs TSR Assignment
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_assignmentstatus" operator="eq" value="985010002" /></filter>

views.name: Needs CSSR Assignment
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_assignmentstatus" operator="eq" value="985010003" /></filter>

views.name: Quotes >= $3K
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_worktype" operator="eq" value="985010000" /><condition attribute="qfu_totalvalue" operator="ge" value="3000" /></filter>

views.name: Overdue Work Items
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_overduesince" operator="not-null" /></filter>

views.name: Work Items with Sticky Notes
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /><condition attribute="qfu_stickynote" operator="not-null" /></filter>

views.name: Recent Actions
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>

views.name: Attempt Actions
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_countsasattempt" operator="eq" value="1" /></filter>

views.name: Non-Attempt Actions
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_countsasattempt" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>

views.name: Pending Alerts
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010000" /></filter>

views.name: Failed Alerts
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010002" /></filter>

views.name: Sent Alerts
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010001" /></filter>

views.name: Suppressed/Skipped Alerts
views.filterxml: <filter type="and"><filter type="or"><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010003" /><condition attribute="qfu_status" operator="eq" value="985010004" /></filter></filter>
